race.comment: SAINT ALDWYN (12) shed the maiden tag over this track and trip when having his first run for the new stable and will have taken a lot from that breakthrough victory. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. RUNWITHTHETIDE (8) has only missed a drum once in six spins around this circuit and gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim. Ready to peak now fourth run back from the spell and cannot be discounted lightly. Former Victorian EYE OF THE EAGLE (2) has been thereabouts in both outings since moving north and should find this a touch easier than what he faced down south. In the mix. SCRUMPTIOUS (13) saves her best form for this distance range and maps nicely for this from gate three. Worth plenty of thought. TAKE ACHANCE ON ME (14) next in line from the champion Waller yard.
